---
title: "Muireann Ryle"
image: me.png
about:
    template: solana
    image-shape: round
    links:
        - icon: linkedin
          text: LinkedIn
          href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/muireann-ryle-2797242a0/
          target: _blank
        - icon: github
          text: GitHub
          href: https://github.com/muireann-ryle
          target: _blank
        - icon: envelope
          text: Email
          href: mailto:muireann.ryle2@mail.dcu.ie

---

About this site
